since_last: 35% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +0.53%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +1.34% · Gold -0.05% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 35% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +0.53%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +0.53%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at +4.14%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +4.14%, MU +3.18%, SMCI +2.94%, VRT +2.22%, PWR +1.82%. Laggards: SPCX -3.86%, CHKP -3.85%, SAP -3.03%, DV -2.23%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.86% at $177.86
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.86% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
